productDisplayName: Baggit Women Bazaar Doko Brown Handbag
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and essentials in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish handbag from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this bag anywhere and add style to any casual outfit.Height: 27 cmWidth: 34 cmDepth: 13 cmCreated from leatherette for durabilityTwo main zipped compartment with one compartment with an internal zipped pocketOne zipped pocket on the front with a flap over itThree pockets on the front with magnetic button closuresOne zippered pocket at the backTwo short handles to carry style and easeBuckle design on the front for styleBrand name printed below the flap on the frontBag careWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
